summary: The eth-wire pinger divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in ping, timeout, and pending returns; no pinger state-machine behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 152: M	crates/net/eth-wire/src/pinger.rs.
The isolated patch only changes Poll::Ready(Ping), Poll::Ready(Timeout), and Poll::Pending returns to semicolon-terminated forms.
No interval tick handling, timeout timer reset, WaitingForPong transition, TimedOut transition, or pending behavior changed.
